message:
feat(dep,validation,storage): thread dep_type through would_create_cycle signature

Pass dep_type: Option<&str> to would_create_cycle so cycle detection can
be scoped to the actual dependency type being added; MCP dep_add now skips
the cycle check entirely for non-blocking dep types instead of always
running it. Minor code style fixes (formatting, unwrap_or, indentation).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
